rationale: The pair has clear topical proximity (both are JMR salesforce-management studies with longitudinal firm data and heterogeneity/endogeneity considerations), so it is not safe to treat as an obvious incidental mention. However, the matched evidence is only a bare DOI reference (no in-text citation context or quoted reference text), and the cited paper’s core construct (SFV/CLV-based valuation) is distinct from the citing paper’s core outcome (turnover hazard), so importance cannot be confirmed from current evidence.
